response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or geospatial data pipelines, and their work with DLang and Node.js does not align with the core requirement of high-performance routing tile systems. Their GIS work is open-source and application-focused, not pipeline-optimized for low-latency, globally scalable navigation data.
strengths: Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and systems
Demonstrated expertise in data integrity and real-time systems via DLang and microservices
concerns: No evidence of modern C++ or Rust development in production routing or mapping pipelines
Lacks demonstrated experience with routing tile generation or navigation data optimization
Primary technologies (DLang, Node.js) are not aligned with required stack (C++/Rust, Linux systems)
